description:
Half-Life Advanced Effects (HLAE) is a tool to enrich Source (mainly CS:GO) engine based movie making.


- Included AfxHookGoldSrc 2.25.3 (2026-07-10T14:17Z)
- Included AfxHookSource2 0.40.0 (2026-07-10T14:17Z)
- HLAE (Installer): Updated installer FFMPEG to 8.1.1-9 (BtbN)
- HLAE: Custom loader Environment Variables are now empty by default for new installs (usually not needed)
AfxHookGoldSrc 2.25.3 (2026-07-10T14:17Z)
- Fixed #1181 GoldSrc: audio bugged in steam + steam_legacy in latest HLAE version
AfxHookSource2 0.40.0 (2026-07-10T14:17Z)
- mirv-script: added mirv.getDemoFilePath (pre-work for #1173)
- mirv-script: Added mirv.fs object with some file system functions (pre-work for #1173)
- mirv-script: Added mirv.resolveGamePath and mirv.getGameDirectory (pre-work for #1173)
- mirv-script (internal change should be transparent): switched websocket from async-std-rutime to smol-runtime
- Adjusted to CS2 update (1.41.6.8). Thanks for help to @Co1Swet @kaputlog @GAMMACASE
Notice for mirv-script users, if you use a custom FRAME_RENDER_PASS constant: changed from 11 to 12.
